author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--config-tracker-remote
content: Plan: Add a tracker_remote config key to hook-config.json (defaults to 'origin'). Add a remote: String field to SyncManager and KnowledgeManager, read from config in their ::new() constructors. Replace all ~35 hardcoded 'origin' literals with &self.remote in sync.rs, knowledge.rs, shared_writer.rs. For command files (trust.rs, migrate.rs, agent.rs), add a helper to read the tracker remote from config. The style.rs 'origin' references are for the separate style cache repo and should NOT be changed. Add 'tracker_remote' to the config registry in config.rs so users can set it via crosslink config set tracker_remote <name>.
